description_long: This object consists of several tall, slender green stems supporting large, vibrant pink daisy-like flowers with yellow centers. The petals are numerous, elongated, and radiate symmetrically from the center, creating a full, layered appearance. The flowers are positioned at varying heights, with some blooms facing forward and others angled to the side, giving a natural, organic arrangement. The stems are interspersed with broad, ovate leaves that are a muted green with visible veins. The overall structure is upright and delicate, typical of ornamental flowering plants found in urban parks or landscaped sidewalks. The coloration and form suggest a cheerful, decorative presence suitable for enhancing public or residential outdoor spaces.
description: Tall green stems with large, pink daisy-like flowers and broad ovate leaves, arranged in a natural, upright cluster. The blooms are vibrant and layered, with yellow centers and radiating petals.
description_view_0: Front view showing three prominent pink flowers with yellow centers, upright stems, and several broad green leaves.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the flower cluster, with overlapping petals and visible stem curvature.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the flowers and the arrangement of leaves along the stems.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the staggered heights of the flowers and the layering of petals and leaves.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration around the central disk, with significant overlapping and layering, creating a symmetrical and full appearance typical of composite flowers.
